news.headline: parcelLab partners with OrderProtection at NRF 2025 to enhance post-purchase experience, setting new standard for retailers.
news.summary: At the NRF 2025: 'Retail’s Big Show' Convention in New York, parcelLab, a prominent post-purchase experience platform, revealed its recent integration with OrderProtection. This enhancement aims to enhance retailers' post-purchase processes and elevate customer trust and satisfaction levels. By incorporating this cutting-edge feature into their strategies, retailers can set a higher standard for customer experiences. This integration allows retailers to offer more streamlined and sophisticated post-purchase experiences, ultimately benefitting their operations.

Situated near the prestigious Austin Country Club and the renowned Pennybacker Bridge, the property offers an exclusive location. news.headline: David R. Carey joins Zayo board, boasting 45 years of experience, including at T-Mobile, driving growth for company.
news.summary: In Denver today, Zayo, a top global communications infrastructure provider, revealed David R. Carey as their newest board member. With a vast career spanning 45 years, which involved establishing TeleScope Advisors, LLC, and holding the position of Executive Vice President at T-Mobile during the pivotal turnaround and Sprint Corp acquisition, Carey's vast experience positions him as a valuable addition to Zayo's leadership team. Zayo is recognized as one of the rapidly expanding fiber companies in the industry.

news.headline: Global biosimulation market expected to reach $14.57 billion by 2030, with 16.05% CAGR growth from 2020-2023.
news.summary: A report titled “Biosimulation Market (2024 Edition)” has been included in the offerings of ResearchAndMarkets.com. The global biosimulation market experienced a growth rate of 16.05% from 2020 to 2023. In 2023, the market was worth USD 6.09 billion, and it is projected to reach USD 14.57 billion by 2030. The report offers insights on the market, including analysis by type (services, software), application, deployment model outlook, region, and country.

news.headline: Smartsheet names Jim Hahn as VP of Corporate Communications, brings 2 decades of experience.
news.summary: In Bellevue, Washington, the AI-enhanced work management platform, Smartsheet (NYSE: SMAR), has welcomed Jim Hahn as their new Vice President of Corporate Communications. With over 20 years of experience in guiding communications strategies for enterprise technology companies, Hahn has held executive communication positions at Dell for fifteen years. Hahn's expertise in this realm is expected to bring valuable insights to Smartsheet as they continue to navigate key moments in their growth and development.

news.headline: GoodRx provides free telehealth visits to LA residents affected by wildfires with the code LA-GOODRX-CARE.
news.summary: GoodRx (GDRX) based in Santa Monica, California, is providing free online healthcare provider visits to residents affected by the wildfires in Los Angeles County. California residents can use the code LA-GOODRX-CARE on GoodRx Care for medical consultations. The wildfires have impacted hundreds of thousands in California. GoodRx is the leading prescription savings platform in the U.S. and is taking this initiative to assist those in need during this crisis.

news.headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. acquires Wealth Management Partners Pty Ltd in Perth, Australia. Transaction details undisclosed.
news.summary: In Rolling Meadows, Illinois, on January 10, 2025, Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. revealed the acquisition of Wealth Management Partners Pty Ltd (WMP) located in Perth, Western Australia. The financial terms of the deal were not disclosed. WMP is a specialized financial planning firm.

news.headline: Bitcoin reaching an all-time high doesn't confirm maximalists' beliefs.
news.summary: A new report has revealed that global carbon dioxide emissions reached a record high of 42.7 billion tons in 2019, which is a 0.6% increase from the previous year. This increase is primarily attributed to the growth in China's emissions, which went up by 2.6%. The United States also saw a rise in emissions by 2.3%, while the European Union managed to reduce their emissions by 5%. Overall, these findings highlight the urgent need for countries to ramp up their efforts in combating climate change and reducing carbon emissions in order to meet the goals set by the Paris Agreement.

news.headline: Khadas reveals new modular mini PC with Intel Core Ultra Series 2 at CES 2025, impressing global audience with innovative tech.
news.summary: In January 10, 2025, at the Consumer Electronics Show (CES) in Las Vegas, Khadas captured the attention of audiences worldwide with their revolutionary product concepts and creative technological advancements. Their displays emphasized the vast capabilities of upcoming computing gadgets. Khadas, a tech company committed to catering to a wide range of users, impressed attendees with their innovative approach and cutting-edge offerings displayed at the event.

news.headline: Uplevyl's Future Forward Accelerator in Austin aims to upskill 1,000 female innovators for the AI era.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, Uplevyl has introduced the Future Forward Accelerator program aimed at 1,000 female leaders looking to establish themselves in the rapidly changing landscape of AI business. With AI roles being filled rapidly, the program offers women a chance to become proficient AI leaders as the industry evolves. The global economy is expected to benefit from AI with a projected 15.7 trillion dollars contribution by 2030, emphasizing the critical time for women to secure their positions in this field.

news.headline: VerifiedX launches VFX SwitchBlade wallet with full native Bitcoin functionality at BitMart in TORONTO, Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Toronto on January 10, 2025, the VFX Network by VerifiedX.io rolled out its mainnet non-custodial wallet, VFX SwitchBlade. This wallet offers complete native Bitcoin capabilities and introduces a pioneering approach to fully decentralized and self-custodial operations.

news.headline: PureSky Energy launches 4.4 MWdc Cotuit Solar Farm with 1.4 MWdc battery storage in Sandwich, MA, marking their 11th operation.
news.summary: In Sandwich, Massachusetts, on January 10, 2025, PureSky Energy, known for its sustainable energy initiatives, revealed that the Cotuit community solar farm has officially begun operating. The site includes a 4.4 MWdc solar farm along with a 1.4 MWdc battery energy storage system. This development signifies PureSky's 11th successful project in the region.

news.headline: Research suggests Online Dating Market to expand into niche markets and globally, estimating a growth from USD 7.22 billion in 2023 to USD 13.14 billion by 2030, at a CAGR of 5.79% during 2020-2023.
news.summary: A report on the Online Dating Market has been added to ResearchAndMarkets.com, projecting insights and forecasts from 2020 to 2030. The Global Online Dating market saw a growth rate of 5.79% from 2020 to 2023, with a value of USD 7.22 billion in 2023. It is anticipated to rise to USD 13.14 billion by 2030. The analysis covers platforms such as Mobile Applications and Web-Based Platforms, revenue generation methods, age groups, gender specifics, and regional trends.

Canadian potential PM, Pierre Poilievre's past crypto endorsements may hinder his campaign, industry execs caution.
news.summary: A prominent political figure in Canada, who is a potential candidate for the position of Prime Minister, has previously shown support for cryptocurrencies. However, some leaders within the crypto industry caution that this endorsement could potentially have negative consequences for his forthcoming campaign.

news.headline: Jobs report: Solid hiring, lower unemployment rate will keep Fed on hold. S&P 500 falls as futures drop.
news.summary: The latest jobs report revealed an unexpected increase in payroll numbers, with the unemployment rate dropping. However, S&P 500 futures experienced a decline in response. The solid hiring and reduction in unemployment suggest that the Federal Reserve may maintain its current interest rates.

news.headline: Inflation expectations hit 2008 levels - highest in years.
Consumer inflation worries peak since 2008. UoM survey: Inflation expectations soar, with 1-year at 3.3%, 5-year at 3.3%. Wall Street sees 2-month lows.
news.summary: Long-term inflation expectations among U.S. consumers have hit levels not seen since 2008, causing concerns about the Federal Reserve's ability to control price pressures. The University of Michigan's consumer sentiment survey for January showed a significant increase in inflation expectations. The year-ahead inflation gauge rose to 3.3% from December's 2.8%, while the five-year expectations also climbed to 3.3%, the highest since June 2008. Despite a slight dip in the overall consumer sentiment index to 73.2, down from 74 in December, concerns over inflation intensified. Joanne Hsu, the director of the University of Michigan’s Surveys of Consumers, highlighted the worrying surge in inflation expectations, indicating this trend's infrequency in recent years.

Wells Fargo: An interest rate cut by the fed in March looks increasingly unlikely.
BTC drops 1.5% on Fed rate cut concerns; $88K target still in sight. Ends 14-candle green streak amid market speculations for 2025 cuts.
news.summary: After a streak of 14 consecutive increases, the price of Bitcoin has finally declined. This change comes amidst market expectations shifting away from the likelihood of additional interest rate reductions in 2025.

news.summary: The Biden administration is intensifying efforts to control the Russian "shadow fleet" and implementing measures to limit oil and gas output.

news.headline: Microbot Medical closed an $8.6 million offering of 3,788,550 common stock shares at $2.27/share, alongside issuing 7,577,100 preferred investment options with an exercise price of $2.10/share for a duration of two years.
news.summary: Microbot Medical Inc. based in Braintree, Mass., revealed on January 10, 2025, the completion of its registered direct offering totaling 3,788,550 shares of common stock at $2.27 per share, in accordance with Nasdaq rules. Simultaneously, the company conducted a private placement issuance of unregistered short-term series H preferred investment options, allowing the acquisition of up to 7,577,100 shares of common stock at $2.10 per share. The options are exercisable immediately upon issuance and for the following two years.

news.headline: Y-mAbs sets 2025 priorities with two business units to expedite radiopharmaceuticals dev and boost DANYELZA sales.
news.summary: A company has recently created two separate business divisions with the aim of speeding up the clinical development of its Radiopharmaceuticals Platform and maximizing the commercial opportunities related to DANYELZA. This strategic move signifies a focused effort on driving growth in these areas. The company's decision to establish these units underscores its commitment to innovation and expansion within the medical sector.

news.headline: PetVivo partners with Vedco Inc. and Clipper Distributing, expanding market reach to US vet industry giants like MWI, Covetrus.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, PetVivo Holdings, Inc. revealed that they have formed distribution agreements with Vedco Inc. and Clipper Distributing, LLC. PetVivo, known for its advancements in biomedical technology, is dedicated to transforming human biotech and medical device innovations for use in osteoarthritis and lameness products in the US animal market. The partnerships with Vedco and Clipper, renowned for their logistical expertise, aim to enhance the availability of PetVivo products to veterinarians nationwide. Vedco and Clipper's extensive reach includes distribution to major veterinary product suppliers like MWI, Covetrus, Patterson, Midwest Supply, and Penn Supply, bolstering PetVivo's presence in the industry. The collaboration signifies a significant step for PetVivo in expanding its market penetration and accessibility to a broader network of veterinary professionals.

news.headline: Alm Brand issued Tier-2 bonds totaling 500 million in capital for expansion.

Bioxytran's preprint shows potential to improve immunotherapy drugs in cancer, may enhance response rate.
news.summary: In Boston, Massachusetts on January 10, 2025, Bioxytran, Inc. (OTCQB: BIXT), a biotechnology company, shared news about their latest research. The company, focused on developing oral and intravenous drugs for various health conditions like viral diseases, fibrosis, stroke, dementia, and Alzheimer's disease, unveiled a preprint article called “Immune Checkpoint Inhibitors (ICI): Prospects for Galectin-3 Modulation to Increase Objective Response Rate (ORR) and Remission-free Survival in Oncology Patients.” The article, penned by Dr. Adesuyi Ajayi, Dr. David Platt, and Andrew Blumenthal, delves into theories on resistance to ICI therapy, spotlighting galectin-3’s role in resistance mechanisms.

news.headline: Fed's Goolsbee: Productivity is very noisy as a data series but it is still very important to watch; will determine if there is overheating or not.
Fed's Goolsbee: It would be a concern if long rates started rising on the basis of inflation expectations.
Stocks facing increased pressure as new data shows consumer anxiety about potential rise in inflation.
Fed's Goolsbee: So far I do not see evidence of overheating in recent months.
Fed's Goolsbee: Interest-sensitive parts of the economy do show the impact of fed restraint, even if that is offset by things like business confidence.
